title: AI designed a cancer vaccine for dog, but scientists say 'outdated' red tape barrier for human care
description: Rosie the dog had her tumours treated by an mRNA vaccine developed with the help of artificial intelligence. Her owner had decided to explore treatment options using AI chatbots.
content:
An Australian staffy named Rosie gave hope to cancer patients around the world when her tumours were successfully treated with the help of artificial intelligence.

title: Nevada booms as workers flock from California amid game-changing lithium discovery
description: Nevada’s game-changing lithium reserves are fueling the surge, with the mineral becoming increasingly valuable as demand for artificial intelligence technology grows.
content:

title: Amazon in Talks to Sell Trainium AI Chips to Third Parties
description: Amazon is in talks to sell its custom-built Trainium artificial intelligence (AI) chips for use in other companies’ data centers, according to a Bloomberg report cited by ZeroHedge.
